cooling_luminosity_erg_s.citation: McDonald et al. (2012), Nature 488, 349; McDonald et al. (2019), ApJ 885, 63
cooling_luminosity_erg_s.aperture_note: Total X-ray cooling luminosity within r < 100 kpc, 0.7-7.0 keV band
cooling_luminosity_erg_s.unit_conversion: Direct erg/s from X-ray spectral fit

gas_temperature_keV.citation: McDonald et al. (2019), ApJ 885, 63, Fig. 3 deprojected profile
gas_temperature_keV.aperture_note: Deprojected core temperature at r ~ 10-30 kpc

electron_density_cm3.citation: McDonald et al. (2019), ApJ 885, 63, Fig. 3 deprojected profile
electron_density_cm3.aperture_note: Central deprojected electron density within r < 10 kpc

cavity_pressure_erg_cm3.citation: McDonald et al. (2015), ApJ 811, 111; Hlavacek-Larrondo et al. (2015), ApJ 805, 35
cavity_pressure_erg_cm3.aperture_note: ICM thermal pressure at projected cavity radius (~20 kpc)
cavity_pressure_erg_cm3.unit_conversion: p = n_e * kT; converted to erg/cm^3

cavity_radius_kpc.citation: McDonald et al. (2015), ApJ 811, 111; Hlavacek-Larrondo et al. (2015), ApJ 805, 35
cavity_radius_kpc.aperture_note: Effective spherical radius of X-ray cavity from Chandra imaging
cavity_radius_kpc.unit_conversion: Direct kpc from angular size at z=0.596

semi_major_kpc.aperture_note: Projected semi-major axis of ellipsoidal cavity model

semi_minor_kpc.aperture_note: Projected semi-minor axis of ellipsoidal cavity model

cavity_geometry.los_axis_note: Line-of-sight axis assumed c = sqrt(a*b) following Bîrzan et al. (2004)

cavity_distance_kpc.aperture_note: Projected distance of cavity center from BCG nucleus

cavity_age_yr.aperture_note: Adopted fiducial cavity age; see multi-age analysis for alternatives
